column1: Hey jessica, thanks for your interest in traveling with Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from Go Blue here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
okay cool I got you. Which destination were you lookin to book
we are open to anywhere Caribbean
Lol I feel you. FL is super regular
How many ppl in your group? I'll send a few options
thats solid. which school you all from
Oh word we have a big JMU group doing punta cana with us
heard y'all know how to party lol
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get started?
just before prices sky rocket hahaa sometime in the next month we wanna book it
lol yea things are flying rn so I'll send what we have now at the moment but just keep in mind it could change quickly
I'll add the payment plan in there too which lets you reserve things with a deposit and then worry about the rest of it later in the month
is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
dope whats the best email to send to
just sent that over lmk if it came through! slid that cyber week deal in there too just in case you want to take advantage of that
I'll personally be in Punta Cana your week. would be dope to have y'all
So the prices are per person right?
lmk what questions your squad has, im around for the answers
Is the party package really worth it?
Is there any shark related activities my cousin wants to do it lol
I think its worth going off the resort for one of the events. atleast one. adds to the experience
and shark activities is a little out of my lane lmao. they can look into that when y'all get there for check in
yup. double beds, in between a queen size and full size
And how much would it cost if we did 2 rooms for 4 people
So like 2 rooms instead of 1 room
yea I sent you a couple destination options tho. which one were you leaning towards?
So DR I mean lol my bad
5 nights or 4? If you click the link, then hit View Quote, itll show you the exact prices for both of them
Off head I wanna say 4 nights will show you $646 and 5 nights $799?
per person, 4 ppl in the room
but for 5 nights with two rooms instead of 1 room
you can factor the cyber week deal into that if youre looking to get things reserved within the day. additional $75 off
Oh the $75 off is per person,
So if we did 2 rooms it would be $899 before the discount?
Nah you may be looking at the wrong section
where it says 2 per room, means 2 people in a room
if youre doing 4 to a room. its the 4 per room price, at the top
Yeah so if the 4 of us wanted to spilt up and do 2 to a room each
Then it would be that price
ahh got you. thought you meant 4 to a room
yes 899 before the discount. so $824 per person for the 2 person rooms
Just seeing the different options haha
Sorry probably worded that werid too lol
I'm gunna talk to them and hopefully book tm so we can get the deal haha
Yea facts def worth it lol. just lmk
heyy Jess checkin in, how we feelin about the options so far?
good we are definitely going to book! Just figuring out people and making sure everyone's 100% in! I will let you know when we are ready!
also how much would it be to get a flight through you
which airport you wanna fly out of? its a lot cheaper to get those separately but more than happy to take a look if you'd rather the convenience
The flights right now seem pretty expensive! Just trying to check all my options! Either RIC, DCA, BWI, IAD
yo Jess would you be cool with leaving Friday? flights are a lot cheaper https://www.google.com/travel/flights/s/XcejfpLtWBMmdgxNA
I'll check tomorrow too I know Tuesday's are a little cheaper for flights
lol aight bet lmk. we gonna make this work
heyy Jess, we find any flights today?
Jessss whats up, how we feelin about everything so far?
sup! we still lookin to get situated for spring break?
hey! Yes so sorry it was finals week and I was slammed with work!
all good! how'd finals go for you
It looks like the flights are still super expensive
yeaa I mean typically they dont go down. on rare occasions tho
march is such a busy season for travel
well that sucks lol, I'll check tm and then if the prices are the same I'll just take the L and pay them
Lol I mean its gonna be worth it youre gonna have the time of your life
Jessss whats up, we wanna make a move on that option?
yes! are the prices still the same? I think there is going to be 3 of us now instead of 4
Yea I'm able to honor the same prices for you. thats fine we'll jus do one room of 3!
Want me to get that set up for y'all?
should be in your email inbox. lmk if anyone needs help getting on and navigating through
heyy Jess whats up, how we lookin with everything?

hey so sorry for the delay with the holidays it's been hard to rally everyone. I'm hoping to have everything sent over by this weekend at the latest, thanks for your help with everything!!!! And thanks for being so understanding hahaha
Oh okay, i'll ave to adjust the reservation slightly then
Friday deposit cool? youll have through the whole day
thats just the furthest I can push anything without have to deactivate
The only thing is I might need to switch the dates just based on flight but let me check into that really quick again
there is its just more expensive
did y'all want to do 6 instead
Okay we can keep it 5 nights can we do 16-21?
that was a cheaper flight option on that date
did you want me to update that?
Hey emma and I are paid for and booked! My cousin Kelsey is going to text you bc she might need more time to talk to her boss
Hey! Kelsey is going to reach out to you but she still needs a few days. If she can't come, how much more per person would emma and I need to pay?
okay cool. yea your balance will be $60 if she doesnt come
heyy checkin in, any update on Kelsey?
hey did you hear from her?
Hey yeah unfortunately she's unable to join, sorry she said she had reached out to you! Let me know the next steps for emma and I!
actually she did yea apologies! will consolidate things to a 2 person room for you. pricing will adjust just a little
hey can you pay that last remaining balance so we can get you all situated!
its $70 from the occupancy change last month
Hey can you send me the link to pay it!
yo! yea you just need to log into your account here https://secure.gobluetours.com/site/public/sign-in
if we wanna do a club off site can we purchase that when we get there? We saw the one for the underground cave??
you can but I dont know what the cost will be on site or what will be available. I can add it here for you online before you go tho!
ofc! did we wanna add any on?
yeah how much would it be for the cave club?
Yo! the Cave is an open bar event, coach bus transportation included, $79 for the night
Side note, we need your flight info uploaded asap so we can sched your transportation
I can upload the flight info today!
yea lmk if you wanna add it in and I got you
hey Jess are you on the same flight as Emma
Yes so sorry I've been meaning to update the account
And we do wanna add the cave if still possible!!
yea we can do the cave, y'all able to pay the balance off by noon?
we can do it by 1 if that works??
do you still need me to upload flight info or do you have it thru emma
got the flight info added in
Hey! We've tried going to the front desk 3 times to get our room keys to work with the lights/power and not just the door. Do you know how we can fix this so we can have power?
Yo! So when you put it in the light switch the power doesn't cut on?
our ac unit is starting to leak as well I guess bc we don't have the power
Just let the onsite team know whats up
hotel is aware now as well, will let you know next steps
Hey checkin in did that get resolved?
